outcomes.eachplus3:
spend them on the following changes and effects:
  • 1 - Panoramic Eye Distribution: Nothing can sneak up on or surprise you.
  • 1 - Very Tall: You’re very tall.
  • 2 - Psychic Connection: You can share memories, feelings, and thoughts with each other in a lossless way.
  • 2 - Double-Focus: You can perform two actions simultaneously with no problem.
  • 3 - Exponential Muscle Growth: A simple punch or kick from you deals 3 Harm.
  • 3 - Quality Shift: When this Meld is complete, you can trade QAs between the combined people freely.
  • 3 - Normal: You look normal. Either like one of you, or like a combination of the two of you that wouldn’t draw attention in a mundane environment.
  • 7 - Ranged Weapon: The combination has created a powerful ranged weapon out of your combined flesh or out of a supernatural combination of your minds. You can deal 3 Harm on anything you can see.
  • 7 - Larger Than Life: Select one skill (such as an art, science, craft, or physical talent) that you are, in combination, the best in the world at. For the duration of your Meld, no one can surpass you at that skill.
  • 14 - Unbeatable: You cannot lose a physical fight against any foe or number of foes. This does not mean you can always win, but you cannot lose.
